name: Apple and Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium Granny Smith Apples (peeled and cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the Granny Smith apples.
2. Thoroughly wash the spinach, removing any fibrous stems. Dry the spinach and place it in a salad bowl.
3. Add the sliced fennel, apples, and onions to the salad bowl.
4. Toss with celery seed dressing.
5. Trim with fennel tops.
6 servings.
